name: LawHelp.org
description: Find free legal aid programs in your community. Provides legal information, court forms, self-help resources, and referrals to local legal aid and pro bono programs.

name: ABA Free Legal Answers
description: Virtual legal advice clinic where qualifying users post civil legal questions and volunteer lawyers provide basic legal information and advice. No ongoing representation.

name: USAGov Legal Aid
description: Government resource for finding free or low-cost legal help. Special programs for military, veterans, seniors, and people with disabilities.

name: Legal Services Corporation
description: Find legal aid organizations in your area that provide free civil legal services to low-income individuals and families.

name: Avvo
description: Free legal advice from lawyers, attorney ratings and reviews, and legal guides. Ask questions and get answers from verified attorneys.

name: Rocket Lawyer
description: Online legal services including document creation, attorney consultations, and business formation. Free trial available.

name: LegalZoom
description: Online legal document services, business formation, estate planning, and attorney consultations. Paid services with satisfaction guarantee.

name: Nolo
description: Legal encyclopedia, do-it-yourself legal books, forms, and software. Free legal information and paid products for self-help legal needs.

name: Justia
description: Free case law, codes, regulations, and legal information for lawyers, businesses, students, and consumers worldwide.

name: FindLaw
description: Legal information, lawyer directory, and legal forms. Free resources for consumers and legal professionals.

name: American Bar Association Lawyer Referral
description: Directory of lawyer referral services certified by state and local bar associations. Get matched with qualified attorneys in your area.

name: State Bar of California
description: Certified lawyer referral services directory for California. Find pre-screened attorneys for 30-minute consultations.

name: New York State Bar Association
description: Lawyer referral service for New York. Free referrals, $35 for 30-minute consultations with matched attorneys.

name: Pro Bono Net
description: National nonprofit supporting pro bono and legal aid programs. Connects volunteers with organizations needing legal help.

name: Volunteer Lawyers for the Arts
description: Pro bono legal services for artists and arts organizations. Workshops, clinics, and referrals available.

name: National Disability Rights Network
description: Legal advocacy services for people with disabilities. Protection and advocacy systems in every state and territory.

name: National Veterans Legal Services Program
description: Free legal assistance to veterans and their families. Focus on VA benefits, discharge upgrades, and veterans rights.

name: National Immigration Law Center
description: Defending and advancing the rights of low-income immigrants. Policy analysis, litigation, and advocacy.

name: National Domestic Violence Hotline
description: 24/7 crisis hotline providing support, information, and legal referrals for domestic violence survivors.

name: RAINN National Sexual Assault Hotline
description: 24/7 hotline for survivors of sexual assault. Confidential support and local legal resource referrals.

name: Cornell Legal Information Institute
description: Free access to law online. Complete collection of US codes, regulations, court rules, and legal encyclopedia.

name: CourtListener
description: Free legal opinions database with millions of legal opinions from federal and state courts.

name: Legal Aid at Work
description: Free and low-cost legal services for low-income workers. Employment law, disability rights, and work-family issues.

name: Eldercare Locator
description: Public service connecting older adults and caregivers with local legal services and elder law attorneys.

name: National Consumer Law Center
description: Advocacy for consumer justice and economic security for low-income individuals. Resources on consumer rights and protections.
